interpretation: Negative conditional association in pooled data.
caution: Mixes cross-province and within-province variation; not a main causal estimate.

interpretation: Positive within-province association after absorbing province fixed effects.
caution: Does not absorb common year shocks.

interpretation: Negative association after absorbing year fixed effects.
caution: Does not absorb time-invariant province heterogeneity.

interpretation: Positive association after province and year fixed effects.
caution: Still a linear baseline association, not final causal proof.

interpretation: Stable negative theta across learners, seeds, folds, and K=2/5/10 sweeps.
caution: Opposite sign from TWFE; main DML has no province dummies in nuisance functions, so it relies mainly on between-province variation.

interpretation: Weak and sign-unstable across learners once province dummies are added; CIs contain zero in 78% of runs.
caution: About 95% of treatment variation is between provinces, so little within-province variation remains; see reports/tables/dml_theta_province_fe.csv.

interpretation: ATE negative in all seed runs, ranging from -17.21 to -1.86; CATE distribution mostly negative.
caution: Magnitude is seed-sensitive and CIs contain zero; exploratory heterogeneity only, not a main causal estimate; see reports/tables/crf_stability_by_seed.csv.
